json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Select one course from the following list. Portuguese 27 is recommended.

options.title: Portuguese M35 or Spanish M35
courses: PORTGSE M35 - Spanish, Portuguese, and Nature of Language
SPAN M35 - Spanish, Portuguese, and Nature of Language

options.title: Spanish 25 or 27
courses: SPAN 27 - Advanced Spanish Composition for Heritage Speakers

options.title: Spanish Grammar
courses: SPAN 100A - Introduction to Study of Spanish Grammar: Phonology and Morphology
SPAN 100B - Introduction to Study of Spanish Grammar: Syntax

options.title: Literature
courses: PORTGSE 130A - Introduction to Literature in Portuguese
PORTGSE 130B - Introduction to Literature in Portuguese

json_data.title: Honors Program
courses: PORTGSE 198A - Senior Honors Research in Portuguese I
SPAN 198A - Senior Honors Research in Spanish I
